strategies.guideline: Document achievements weekly using business metrics (dollars saved, headcount optimized, feature adoption). Align with engineering managers on advancement goals every quarter rather than waiting for annual reviews.

Map current functional assets to target tech domains. Build adjacent proof-of-work (e.g. open source contributions for developers pivoting to DevRel, or full system designs for SDE-1 to SDE-2 pivots).
Acquire at least two external offers to establish a market benchmark. Pivot discussions from raw salary desires to value delivery, and negotiate sign-on bonuses and equity refreshers.
